insert_torrent_cache: INSERT INTO torrent_cache (date_cached, movies_json, series_json, url_end, npseries) VALUES (:date_cached, :movies_json, :series_json, :url_end, :npseries)
update_torrent_cache: UPDATE torrent_cache SET movies_json = :movies_json, series_json = :series_json, url_end = :url_end, npseries = :npseries WHERE date_cached = :date_cached
